response.justification: Exceptional candidate exceeding the 6+ year requirement with 12+ years of demonstrated full-stack expertise. Recent work at re:cinq on AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly aligns with emerging job needs. Strong on TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases, Docker, and testing practices. Primary concerns are a 7-month unexplained career gap (cited as caregiving) and absence of Nest.js/Vitest specifically mentioned, though equivalent framework experience is clear.
strengths: 12+ years full-stack experience with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React expertise across multiple senior/staff roles; significantly exceeds 6-year requirement
Recent AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development at re:cinq (2025) directly addresses the job's emerging technology needs and demonstrates currency
Deep commitment to code quality and craftsmanship demonstrated through TDD, open-source contributions (GISCollective, Trial), and formal teaching on testing and refactoring
concerns: Currently in 7-month career gap since October 2025 (caregiving cited), raising potential deployment timeline and commitment concerns despite legitimate explanation
Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned; only Node.js/TypeScript credentials shown—would require clarification despite strong architectural foundation
Cloud platform experience documented only for AWS (CDK); GCP and Azure not mentioned, potentially limiting multi-cloud environment readiness

key_factors.factor: Recent AI agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq
Current 7-month employment gap and short recent tenure
